case_overview.subject: Abel (child)
case_overview.context: Child welfare assessment with contact/placement considerations

liverpool_context_notes: Heavy reliance on early intervention frameworks
Kinship assessments typically slower than foster

critical_examination_areas: Is assessment proportionate to actual harm evidence?
Do decision points follow procedural sequencing or accelerate?
Are behavioral assessments attributed correctly (child vs. systemic)?
Contact restriction justifications: protective need vs. control mechanism?
Advocate counter-arguments: are they substantive or procedurally marginalized?
